KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub structured operation.
KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.title: KmaApiHubStructuredOutput

data_type.description: Response format requested from KMA APIHub. XML is the official sample/default; JSON may be used only when the operation supports it. Official parameter name: dataType. Operation: AmmIwxxmService/getMetar.
data_type.title: Data Type

icao.description: ICAO airport/station code for aviation METAR data. Official APIHub examples include RKSI Incheon, RKSS Gimpo, RKPC Jeju, RKPK Gimhae, RKNY Yangyang, RKNW Wonju, RKTU Cheongju, RKTN Daegu, RKTH Pohang, RKJJ Gwangju, RKJB Muan, RKJY Yeosu, RKPU Ulsan, RKPS Sacheon, and RKJK Gunsan. Do not pass a Korean place name here. Official parameter name: icao. Operation: AmmIwxxmService/getMetar.
icao.title: Icao

num_of_rows.description: Number of rows to return. Use the default unless more rows are needed. Official parameter name: numOfRows. Operation: AmmIwxxmService/getMetar.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

page_no.description: Page number, 1-based. Use the default unless the citizen asks for another page. Official parameter name: pageNo. Operation: AmmIwxxmService/getMetar.
page_no.title: Page No
